en.name: Atomic Defense CQCM ballistic mask (Skull) V2
en.description: A reinforced CQCM ballistic mask pushed through Tony's back-room workbench and sent back meaner than before. The plates have been thickened, the liner reworked, and the straps tuned so it bites less into your face when the shooting starts. Two armor classes higher than the standard mask, with extra durability and reduced movement penalties. The skull paint is still there for the same reason Tony likes it: people hesitate when death is already staring at them.
